title: Scoping Estimate Record
description: Structured pre-sale scoping estimate emitted by the scope-project skill. Single source of truth that drives the branded Excel workbook, the client-ready summary, and (after a deal closes) the pricing-calibration store. The phase/task/workstream breakdown is the granularity HubSpot's lump deal amount cannot provide.
$comment: workstreams+budgetSummary (ranges mode) vs phases+committedSummary (committed mode) are required conditionally — see allOf at the end.

estimator.description: Who produced the estimate (person or agent id)

discoverySource.description: Relative path(s) to the discovery notes the scope was built from

calibrationCited.description: Comparable past projects cited from calibration when setting ranges/rates. Empty if none applied.

vertical.description: Industry/vertical bucket used for calibration grouping (e.g., pe, real-estate, automotive, insurance, voip, multifamily, logistics, manufacturing, other)

size.description: Rough size signal (employee/user count band or revenue band)

hubspotUrl.description: HubSpot deal/company record URL captured at intake. KEY for stamping won/lost + final amount onto this record later (Session 3 calibration sync).

systemsInScope.description: Named systems/platforms in scope (e.g., HubSpot, NetSuite, Aircall)

pricingModel.description: How the engagement is priced. Drives client-facing disclosure rules (fixed/T&M hide hour totals per brand/Gamma rules).

defaultRate.description: Default/blended hourly rate from sayer-rates (authoritative). NOT a hardcoded constant.

estimateMode.description: ranges = min/max/median per workstream (the pre-sale discovery scoping standard). committed = single hours/amount per phase with a tech fee and tiered staff blend (the T&M SOW form). Drives Sheet-1 layout and which fields are required. Absent == ranges.

blendedRate.description: Headline blended rate (committed mode). Derivable from staffMix as sum(rate*allocationPct/100).

techFeePct.description: Technology & Admin Fee percentage on the consulting subtotal (e.g., 5 = 5%). Committed mode.

feeStructure.description: Free-text fee terms for the Sheet-1 metadata block (e.g., 'T&M, monthly invoicing, Net-15, +5% Tech & Admin Fee').

paymentSchedule.description: Optional invoice/payment schedule rows for committed-mode SOWs. Renders as a block below the grand total on Sheet 1. Sum of amounts should reconcile to committedSummary.grandTotal.

lead.description: Sayer engagement lead name (Sheet-1 metadata block).

staffMix.description: Tiered staffing blend documenting the blended rate (committed mode).

phases.description: Optional delivery-sequencing grouping (present when a phased approach is recommended). Workstreams reference a phase by id; pricing calibration keys off workstream.category, not phase.

kind.description: contingency rows (e.g., discovery contingency) render but are flagged distinctly.

description.description: Phase description shown in the Sheet-1 committed-mode rollup (column B).

committedHours.description: Committed hours for this phase (committed mode). Sheet-1 'Est. Hours'. Required in committed mode.

committedAmount.description: Committed amount (committed mode). Sheet-1 'Est. Amount' = committedHours x blendedRate.

tasks.description: Task line items rolling up to this phase (committed-mode Sheet 2). Subtotal reconciles to committedHours.

workstreams.description: Primary unit of the estimate and the calibration join key. One row per Sheet-1 'Scoping Estimate' line.

category.description: Controlled work-type vocabulary. The calibration query groups on this ('what did we win for migration work in PE?'). Do NOT use free text.

phase.description: Phase id this workstream belongs to, or null if not phased

rate.description: Hourly rate applied to this workstream (usually engagement.defaultRate; may differ for tiered staffing)

cost.description: Extended cost. Invariant: cost.{min,max,median} = hours.{min,max,median} x rate. Stored for direct calibration querying; ingest validates the invariant.

tasks.description: Task-level breakdown -> Sheet 2 'Task Breakdown'. Subtotal of task hours should reconcile to this workstream's median hours (the Sheet-2 integrity check).

hours.description: Single point estimate for the task (median-level)

perCategory.description: Optional rollup by work-type category (precomputed convenience for calibration; derivable from workstreams).

committedSummary.description: Sheet-1 totals for committed (T&M) mode: consulting subtotal -> tech fee -> grand total. Required in committed mode.

clientResponsibilities.description: Sheet 5 section 3 — what the client must provide

openItems.description: Sheet 5 section 4 — unresolved questions that could affect scope

approaches.description: Optional Sheet 6 'Approach Comparison' (present for multi-system / high-dependency projects).

recommendation.description: 1-2 sentence recommended approach + reasoning, mirrors the client summary.

outcome.description: Stamped AFTER the deal closes (Session 3 HubSpot sync), keyed by client.hubspotUrl. Null at scope time. Turns this record from an estimate into a calibration data point.

finalAmount.description: Final signed deal amount from HubSpot

allOf.$comment: Mode-conditional requirements. Absent estimateMode evaluates as ranges (the else branch).
